title: Metric
description: v0 DRAFT. A named, pre-aggregated KPI computed by the producing platform for dashboard display (dashboards never re-aggregate raw data in v1). RECONCILE(doc-04/05): the standard metric key catalog against AccuLynx report primitives.

key.description: Machine key, stable across time (e.g. "revenue_mtd"). Vertical-specific metrics are namespaced like extensions (e.g. "roofing.claims_open").

unit.description: How to interpret value. currency_minor: value is minor units of `currency`.

currency.description: ISO 4217 code; required semantically when unit is currency_minor, null otherwise.

period.description: Aggregation window; null for point-in-time snapshot metrics (as-of updated_at).

updated_at.description: Last time the value was computed.
